message:
fix(expand_tabs): account for CJK character visual width

The expand_tabs function was incrementing column position by 1 for all
characters, but CJK characters are double-width in terminals. This caused
incorrect tab expansion when tabs followed CJK characters.

Changes:
- Extract char_width() helper function from visual_width()
- Update expand_tabs() to use char_width(c) instead of 1
- Add test_expand_tabs_with_cjk test case to verify the fix

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
